subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! The Sun of Truth, though manifest and evident like unto the shining moon and the resplendent sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی شمس حقیقت اگرچه چون مه تابان و خورشید رخشان مشهود و عیان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @belief and denial, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun
